verdict_summary: HAR captured successfully (53MB). Non-PII prompt 'What is 2+2?' rendered answer '2 + 2 = 4.'. CRITICAL FINDING: HAR contains NO bare /rest/thread/<UUID> request — only /rest/thread/mark_viewed/<UUID> and /rest/sse/perplexity_ask (SSE stream). The V7-F target endpoint (bare thread fetch) is NOT triggered in normal session flow; the answer is delivered via SSE.
notes: Procedure completed: DevTools opened BEFORE navigation, Network tab with Preserve log + Disable cache enabled, hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) executed, prompt submitted, 30s+ render wait, HAR exported via Network panel export icon. Anonymous (logged-out) session — login dialog was dismissed; sign-in prompt visible at bottom-left of UI. KEY V7-F INSIGHT: For an anonymous user submitting a prompt and viewing the response in the same session, perplexity does NOT issue a bare /rest/thread/<UUID> GET — the response payload streams via /rest/sse/perplexity_ask. The bare thread fetch likely only fires on direct URL navigation to a pre-existing thread (e.g., reload of /search/<id> or shared link). HAR file gitignored (*.har) — kept LOCAL only as instructed. Dev should pull via AnyDesk if needed for SSE schema audit.
